flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arizona rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.3k → $42.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arizona fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arizona rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (36.6k → 42.5k).
